name: Seeed XIAO ESP32-C6
notes: Seeed Studio XIAO ESP32-C6: a 21 x 17.5 mm board on the ESP32-C6 (RISC-V, Wi-Fi 6 + BLE 5 + 802.15.4 Zigbee/Thread, 4 MB flash). 11 GPIO pins broken out as D0-D10 on castellated pads, 7 per side.
Every XIAO shares the same footprint and D0-D10 silkscreen, but the D-pin to GPIO mapping differs per model - this is the C6 mapping. Do not reuse a C3 or S3 wiring diagram here.
None of the C6 strapping pins (GPIO4/5/8/9/15) are broken out, so every header pin is free to use. The BOOT button (GPIO9) and user LED (GPIO15) stay on-board.
GPIO14 selects the RF antenna (on-board vs external u.FL). It is not on the header - set it in firmware only if your board revision exposes the switch.
BAT+ / BAT- pads on the underside charge a 3.7 V LiPo over USB.
